Post       : *Adolescence*
URL        : https://marginalrevolution.com/marginalrevolution/2025/08/adolescence.html
Posted     : August 31, 2025 at 3:06 am
Author     : Tyler Cowen
Categories : Law, Television, Uncategorized

This is a British TV show, in four episodes, available on Netflix.  It is the first TV show I have wanted to watch in about four years.  I cannot review it without immediate spoilers ( https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=PnRzV4ehSxY ) , but I can tell you it takes place in a school, in a criminal justice system, and in a family.  Northern England, so do turn on those subtitles.  Here are some reviews ( https://www.google.com/search?q=adolescence+tv+show+review&sca_esv=a5ace5942393c46e&source=hp&ei=PumyaObtK8uu5NoPv9LsOQ&iflsig=AOw8s4IAAAAAaLL3Toox8SmRXIFB8oX7GmDPGpmqu22V&ved=0ahUKEwjmhKW8v7KPAxVLF1kFHT8pOwcQ4dUDCBo&uact=5&oq=adolescence+tv+show+review&gs__cBsgcEMjUuMbgHtwzCBwowLjE4LjUuMi4xyAdh&sclient=gws-wiz ) .
